normalization_point: Refining remains Watch because crack spread and inventory gains are not durable FCF by themselves.
Lubricants can move toward Green only when high-margin mix is repeatable and cash-generative.
Chemicals are RedTeam-first because spread rebound can reverse before FCF becomes structural.
Steel is Watch; China demand, raw material cost, and dividends decide whether the story survives.
Iron ore is RedTeam-first because China demand weakness can quickly cut profit and capital return.
Nonferrous needs smelting-margin and FCF evidence; event price moves must be separated.
Copper has AI-grid demand, but company-level Green still needs cost curve, volume, FCF, and returns.
Copper processing input cost is a RedTeam overlay; it can eat the benefit of AI-grid copper demand.
Nickel price rebound is not enough when sulfur/HPAL input costs squeeze battery-grade nickel economics.
Rare metals get stronger only when policy support is tied to price floor, offtake, production, and FCF.
Rare-earth magnet supply-chain evidence is stronger than raw price spikes only when customers, production ramp, feedstock, and FCF are visible.
Export-control news is Stage 1 macro evidence; without company production and offtake it is not Green.
MP-style strategic rare-earth success still needs capital discipline; offering and dilution cap unsafe Green.
Lithium ESS demand can help Stage 1/2 but remains Cycle/Watch without FCF and supply response control.
Gold miners can work as cycles, but safe-haven price alone is not structural visibility.
Gold-miner jurisdiction rerating needs safer assets, production/AISC proof, FCF, and capital return, not gold price alone.
Trading/resource houses rerate on resource-infra FCF and capital allocation, not sales scale alone.
LNG can be Watch-to-Green when long contracts, FID, project stake, and FCF are explicit.
Packaging is mature and cyclical; M&A premium is not durable spread evidence by itself.
Packaging M&A can support Stage 2, but competition remedies and divestments cap Green until FCF and synergy are proven.
Advanced materials are RedTeam-first before commercial revenue and customer validation.
Science themes are Red by default when only papers, preprints, or social-media narratives exist.
Tender offers and governance battles are RedTeam overlays, not EPS/FCF rerating evidence.
Commodity price reversal, supply restart, and dividend cuts are 4C overlays, not positive score.
Resource contracts receive a Stage 3 cap when value, price terms, counterparty, or duration are not disclosed.
